parameters.jsonBody:
={"model":"chat-max","stream":false,"options":{"temperature":0.7,"num_predict":600},"prompt":"You rewrite a seed post for platform '{{ $json.platform }}' in language '{{ $json.lang }}'. Follow platform conventions:
- twitter: max 280 chars, hook + 1 link, casual
- mastodon: max 500 chars, FOSS-friendly, hashtags #privacy #adblock
- reddit: 200-500 words, problem-first, link in last paragraph with maker disclosure ('I built this')
- indiehackers: build-in-public tone, share metric or struggle, no hard sell
- devto: technical writeup, code block if relevant, link at end
- linkedin: professional, 1500 chars, story-driven, soft CTA

Return ONLY the rewritten post, no preamble, no quotes.

SEED:
{{ $json.seed }}

{{ $json.platform }} version:"}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO adoff_autopilot.posts_queue (workflow, platform, lang, body, quality_score, status, scheduled_at) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6, NOW() + (random()*interval '4 hours')) RETURNING id, status;
